Bash(cd C:/ishi-no-niwa && python -c "
import sys
sys.path.insert\(0, 'assets/fairy'\)
from split_spritesheet import make_white_transparent, trim_whitespace, fit_to_square
from PIL import Image
from pathlib import Path

src = Image.open\('assets/fairy/ChatGPT Image Mar 13, 2026, 08_52_25 AM.png'\)
w, h = src.size
cols, rows = 5, 2
cell_w, cell_h = w // cols, h // rows
moods = ['idle','happy','excited','sleeping','thinking','sad','surprised','angry','shy','waving']
out_dir = Path\('assets/fairy'\)
for row in range\(rows\):
    for col in range\(cols\):
        idx = row * cols + col
        x1, y1 = col * cell_w, row * cell_h
        cell = src.crop\(\(x1, y1, x1 + cell_w, y1 + cell_h\)\)
        cell = make_white_transparent\(cell\)
        cell = trim_whitespace\(cell\)
        cell = fit_to_square\(cell, 512\)
        name = f'onyx_3_{moods[idx]}'
        \(out_dir / f'{name}.png'\).save_data if False else cell.save\(str\(out_dir / f'{name}.png'\), 'PNG'\)
        print\(f'  {name}.png'\)
print\('Done!'\)
" 2>&1)
